featureDetection.rationale: Checks scrollIntoView capabilities on Element prototype and displays precise instructions on support status.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Utilizes a safe try/catch block for container-nearest calls, falling back to standard block alignment on older browsers.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Allows real-time selection of three separate rows, driving side-by-side scroll animations in distinct columns.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Instructive real-world focus on the sticky clearance layout problem.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Faithfully utilizes design variables with a clear layout presentation.
